narrative:
Precinct Roaming Shores Village (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 1,227 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.1 percentage points.
